scripts.check:llm-routing: tsx -e "Promise.all([import('./lib/ska-llm-chains.ts'), import('./scripts/ska-agent-llm-primary-fallback-call-drill.ts')]).then(([chains, drill]) => { const chainExports = chains.SKA_CHAIN_REGISTRY ? chains : chains.default; const drillExports = drill.buildScenarios ? drill : drill.default; if (!chainExports?.SKA_CHAIN_REGISTRY) throw new Error('missing_ska_chain_registry'); if (!drillExports?.buildScenarios) throw new Error('missing_ska_llm_drill_exports'); })"
